publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-01-23 23:47:52 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, artwork, lecture notes, photographs, subject files, videotape, audiocassette, broadsides
did.abstract: Correspondence, artwork, lecture notes, photographs, subject files, and other papers; includes broadsides for events at Cornell and in the Ithaca community; includes videotape and audiocassette of Memorial/Testimonial service, and other printed items including Kahn's artwork.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, artwork, lecture notes, photographs, subject files, and other papers; includes broadsides for events at Cornell and in the Ithaca community; includes videotape and audiocassette of Memorial/Testimonial service, and other printed items including Kahn's artwork.

Also, "The Unfinished Autobiography of H. Peter Kahn," compiled by Ruth Gannett Kahn and edited by Charlotte Kahn; and spiral bound copies of newspaper articles about Kahn. Typescript on "Religion, Nature and Art," and typescript manuscript of speech, "Technology and Virtue: Joe Blumenthal and the Spiral Press."
Gifts presented to Cornell Library by Peter Kahn on March 20, 1991. Includes medieval manuscripts, caricatures by G. M. Woodward, engravings and other printed teaching samples.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series V: Course Notebooks, Examples of Work Box 5
Series VI: Letters, Lines, and Pages Box 6
Series VII: Letters of reference, Cornell correspondence re: tenure, promotion Box 7 RESTRICTED
Series IX: Peter Kahn gift to Library Box 1

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Peter Kahn papers. #14-28-2920. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 7 restricted to the permission of the University Archivist.

did.unittitle: Various posters, broadsides and prints designed by Peter Kahn

"The Windmill", by David Cox, engraved by E. P. Brainard

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mezzotint

did.unittitle: Folio li of a 15th century printed book including the lives of John the Evangelist and Thomas the Apostle
Folio cccxxxi from the Cologne Chronicle, included with facsimile pages and introductory text
Engraved plate from octavo book (?) incorporating words "Soyez parfait comme votre Pere celeste est parfait" and numbered III. Page 143
Leaf from Le Charivari with lighograph (numbered 118) by Daumier
Print of caricature by G. M. Woodward title "The Glorious Revolution of the World"
Print of caricature by G. M. Woodward title "Drops of Comfort and Draughts of Delight"
Cover of The Colophon with pictorial design by R. Kent
Folio ccv from the Nuremberg Chronicle
Printed leaf from folio book with text beginning "Fredegonde et Brunehaut" and lithograph by Rouault
